analysis.reasoning: Core message: A neutral, factual note that Russian and Philippine ambassadors discussed Russia–Philippines relations with the EU and Russia–ASEAN cooperation. Evaluation by narrative: RU1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not present; no criticism of the West. RU2 (Russia leads an alternative system) – Partially adjacent due to mention of ASEAN, but the tweet does not frame it as an alternative to the West or advocate multipolarism; it's purely descriptive, so not promoted. RU3 (Russia is a benevolent partner) – The tweet implies routine diplomatic engagement but does not explicitly present Russia as promoting peace/solidarity or reliability; no value-laden framing, so not promoted. RU4 (Russian history admirable) – Not relevant. RU5 (Russia at forefront) – No claims of success or leadership. RU6 (Culture/nature) – Not relevant. Conclusion: No listed strategic narrative is being promoted.
